Will the official OpenAI API status page (https://status.openai.com) report any 'major outage' or 'degraded performance' status specifically for its 'API Services' component, categorized as 'Incident' or 'Degraded Performance' at any point between event_start 2026-03-05 13:11 UTC and the closing_date 2026-03-05 13:41 UTC? Settlement will be based on the status reported on https://status.openai.com for the 'API Services' component. A 'Yes' resolution requires a clear status update indicating 'major outage' or 'degraded performance' for 'API Services' appearing and being visible on the page at any time within the defined 30-minute window. A 'No' resolution will occur if no such status is reported within the window. No data occurring after 2026-03-05 13:41 UTC may influence settlement.

Will the last trade price of Apple Inc. (AAPL) stock on the NASDAQ exchange be greater than $175.00 at the exact timestamp of 2026-03-05 15:41 UTC? The event starts at 2026-03-05 15:11 UTC and closes at 2026-03-05 15:41 UTC. Settlement will be based on the last reported trade price for AAPL on NASDAQ at precisely 2026-03-05 15:41 UTC. If the price is greater than $175.00, the market resolves 'Yes'. Otherwise, it resolves 'No'. No data occurring after 2026-03-05 15:41 UTC may influence settlement.
